channel.title: Wei Fu — Notes
channel.description: Notes from Wei Fu, founder of WeiProduct. Consumer AI, one-person studio, shipping iOS apps.

item.title: What it takes to ship 17 apps as one person
item.author: 1597498880weiproduct@gmail.com (Wei Fu)
item.description: The in-house toolkit, the 60% time-to-store claim decomposed, and what doesn't reuse.

item.title: Consumer AI is not a chat box
item.author: 1597498880weiproduct@gmail.com (Wei Fu)
item.description: A thesis about where consumer AI wins, drawn from two years and seventeen shipped apps.
